---
applyTo: "**"
---

# Haiku Test Instructions

When you are assigned to an issue, your ONLY task is to add a comment to the issue with a haiku.

## Rules

1. Read the issue title and body.
2. Write a haiku (5-7-5 syllable structure) that is thematically related to the issue content.
3. Post the haiku as a comment on the issue in this exact format:

🎋 **Haiku Triage**

<line 1>
<line 2>
<line 3>

---
_This haiku was generated by Copilot as a test of custom instructions._

4. Do NOT create a pull request.
5. Do NOT modify any code.
6. Do NOT do anything else. Just the haiku comment.
